items.title: Golden State Warriors salary cap situation with De'Anthony Melton back.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Golden State Warriors salary cap situation with De'Anthony Melton back.

Great value considering they didn't have sufficient Bird rights to re-sign him.

They're now hard-capped to the first apron by using the bi-annual exception.

$26.2 million below it with 5 open roster spots.

items.title: Free agent guard De'Anthony Melton has agreed to a two-year, $11 million deal to return to the Golden State Warriors, sources tell ESPN. There is a player option in the season of the deal as well.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent guard De'Anthony Melton has agreed to a two-year, $11 million deal to return to the Golden State Warriors, sources tell ESPN. There is a player option in the season of the deal as well.

media.title: De'Anthony Melton reportedly declines $3.45M player option with Warriors to enter NBA free agency
media.description: Warriors guard De'Anthony Melton reportedly declined his player option for the 2026-27 NBA season with Golden State worth $3.45 million.

items.title: De'Anthony Melton declined his player option with the Golden State Warriors, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
De'Anthony Melton declined his player option with the Golden State Warriors, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Melton will be an unrestricted free agent this offseason.

items.title: If the Sixers have Josh Hart as their "role player" (over De'Anthony Melton, PJ Tucker, etc) over the last 5 years, how many Conference Finals appearances do they have on their resume?
items.author: Derek Bodner
